en.name: Level 55 — Pit Stop
en.shortDescription: An infinite abandoned restaurant complex used as a temporary refuge; wanderers are automatically displaced after random intervals.
en.atmosphere: Eerily quiet under perpetual sunlight; damp cool air around 21°C brings drowsiness and quiet introspection.
en.tips: Use it only as a brief sanctuary. Food and water are available. Explore carefully — the average stay is about three days.
